instances.title: Passive key-value snapshot
instances.admission_rationale: The instance stores and returns values by exact key without inference, goal evaluation, alternative search, or revision policy.
instances.formalization_boundary: Immutable lookup over two entries; database transactions and query optimization are excluded.

instances.title: Append-only event recorder
instances.admission_rationale: The instance appends externally supplied records and replays them in order without interpreting, evaluating, or deriving conclusions.
instances.formalization_boundary: Append and replay only; event sourcing projections and policy engines are excluded.

instances.title: Fixed approval workflow
instances.admission_rationale: The instance follows a predeclared routing table from submission to approval or rejection without comparing reasons or revising rules.
instances.formalization_boundary: Deterministic workflow routing; human review content and policy interpretation are external.

instances.title: Arbitrary labeled transition toggler
instances.admission_rationale: The instance moves between labeled states according to an arbitrary transition relation with no semantic interpretation or task.
instances.formalization_boundary: One finite deterministic labeled transition system; any external interpretation is excluded.

instances.title: Static lookup table
instances.admission_rationale: The instance maps each registered input to a frozen output without interpolation, explanation, or rule application.
instances.formalization_boundary: Three-row exact lookup; learned classifiers and default handling are excluded.

instances.title: Three-phase traffic controller
instances.admission_rationale: The instance cycles through fixed signal phases on timer events and does not evaluate evidence, goals, or alternative plans.
instances.formalization_boundary: Open-loop fixed-cycle controller; adaptive traffic optimization is excluded.

instances.title: Elementary cellular automaton Rule 110
instances.admission_rationale: The instance updates every cell from a fixed local rule and contains no explicit goals, reasons, or candidate evaluation.
instances.formalization_boundary: Two finite Rule 110 updates with fixed boundaries; emergent computation claims are excluded.

instances.title: Seeded random finite-state machine
instances.admission_rationale: The instance uses a frozen pseudorandom seed to choose among registered transitions without evaluating reasons or objectives.
instances.formalization_boundary: Five-step seeded random walk; learning and reward are excluded.
